titleStmt.title: SII 10.417: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 417. (A.R. No. 190 of 1905.) ON THE WEST WALL OF THE MAṆḌAPA LEFT OF THE ENTRANCE TO THE TEMPLE OF TRIPURĀNTAKĒŚVARA, TRIPURĀNTAKAM, MARKAPUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT. Ś. 1[1]89. (Prabhava)

summary.p: States that Ēṟuva Manumilidēvarāja gave 25 cows for a perpetual lamp in the temple of Tripurāntaka-Mahādēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīsamadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṁḍalēśvara Oṟayūripuravarādhīśvara kāśyapagōtra kari
kālakulapavitra satyahariścaṁdra vibhavāmarēṁdra mānamuṭṭugaṁḍa calamarttigaṁḍa dāḍī samarttha raṇaraṁga
pārttha vairikuṁjarēṁjara śaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjara kāryyanārāyaṇa nītipārāyaṇa paranārī dūra budhajanādhā
ra [Ā]havabhīma kāminījanakāma Aśvavēdaṁḍabiruda jita dhanābhīlavairivīramurahara vivēkavidyādhara gaṁbhīrasāgara kali
yugarādhēya śaucagāṁgēya vitaraṇavikramāditya Anavarataparahitārdha turagadānasama rdha pratyakṣadharmmanaṁdana
sujanaharicaṁdana Uttamagaṁḍa gaṁḍabhēruṁḍa kaliyugamogaḍa kaisādaṁgarāyagajamada bhaṁga
jaṁgapallavabhayaṁkara tribhuvanipeṁḍāru śrītripurāṁtaka śrīmahādēvaradivya
śrīpādapadmārādhaka parabalasādhaka nāmādisamastapraśastisahitaṁbu laina śrīmanmahāmaṁḍa
lēśvara [Ē]ṟuvamanumilidēvarājulu svastiśrī śubhaśakavaruṣaṁbulu 1189 Agu nēṁṭi prabha
vasaṁvatsarakārttika śu 15 gu nāṁṭi mahākārttiki parvvanimittamuna śrītripurāṁtaka śrīmanma
hādēvaraku Akhaṁḍadīpāni kiccina mōdālu 25
Digital edition of SII 10.417 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
